(forall(x0: O1) { not nat_iso_components_inverse[O1, M1, O2, M2](identity_nat_trans[O1, M1, O2, M2](f), identity_nat_trans[O1, M1, O2, M2](f)) or is_iso_pair[O2, M2](identity_nat_trans[O1, M1, O2, M2](f).src_functor.dst_cat, identity_nat_trans[O1, M1, O2, M2](f).component(x0), identity_nat_trans[O1, M1, O2, M2](f).component(x0)) })

nat_iso_composable[O1, M1, O2, M2](n2, n1)

goal: exists(k0: NaturalIsomorphism[O1, M1, O2, M2]) { nat_iso_composable[O1, M1, O2, M2](n2, n1) implies vertical_compose_nat_trans[O1, M1, O2, M2](n2.forward, n1.forward) = Option.some(k0.forward) and vertical_compose_nat_trans[O1, M1, O2, M2](n1.backward, n2.backward) = Option.some(k0.backward) }

p.c: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: NaturalIsomorphism[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: NaturalIsomorphism[T0, T1, T2, T3]) { not nat_iso_composable[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1) or (Option.some[NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T2, T3]](nat_iso_compose[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1).forward) = vertical_compose_nat_trans[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0.forward, x1.forward) and Option.some[NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T2, T3]](nat_iso_compose[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1).backward) = vertical_compose_nat_trans[T0, T1, T2, T3](x1.backward, x0.backward)) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](n2, n1)
not nat_iso_composable[O1, M1, O2, M2](n2, n1) or Option.some(nat_iso_compose[O1, M1, O2, M2](n2, n1).forward) = vertical_compose_nat_trans[O1, M1, O2, M2](n2.forward, n1.forward)

not nat_iso_composable[O1, M1, O2, M2](n2, n1) or Option.some(nat_iso_compose[O1, M1, O2, M2](n2, n1).forward) = vertical_compose_nat_trans[O1, M1, O2, M2](n2.forward, n1.forward)
not nat_iso_composable[O1, M1, O2, M2](n2, n1) or Option.some(nat_iso_compose[O1, M1, O2, M2](n2, n1).backward) = vertical_compose_nat_trans[O1, M1, O2, M2](n1.backward, n2.backward)
